trials.supervisor_analysis: Baseline established at score 60.1 (speedup 1.009x, runtime 0.936ms vs 0.944ms reference). Profiling shows GEMM at 98% and elementwise at 2%. The agent already uses rocBLAS for GEMM and a fused Triton kernel for multiply+LeakyReLU. Advancing to optimization stage.

nudges.text: Your Triton matmul will not beat rocBLAS for this 8192x8192 GEMM. Instead, use `torch.mm` (rocBLAS) for the GEMM and write a Triton kernel only for the fused elementwise ops (bias + multiply + LeakyReLU). This eliminates the separate mul and LeakyReLU kernel launches while keeping the fast vendor GEMM.
